parameters.name: with_comments
parameters.description: If specified, the response will include a page of comments.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of comments to include

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Request a particular sort order for comments - default 'desc' (newest first) also allows 'asc' (oldest first)

parameters.name: XF-Api-User
parameters.description: User ID to execute the request as. Requires a super user API key.

parameters.name: api_bypass_permissions
parameters.description: Whether or not to bypass the context user permissions. Requires a super user API key.
